data.body: CHECKPOINT: Verification complete. All acceptance criteria met: (1) No 'batches of 5' / '5 sub-agents' / 'groups of 5' in any SKILL.md or .md file under plugins/dso/skills/. (2) fix-bug/SKILL.md Step 7.5.4 already uses MAX_AGENTS protocol (unlimited/N/0). (3) debug-everything/SKILL.md batch planning and pre-check already use dynamic MAX_AGENTS. (4) sprint/SKILL.md Phase 3/4 already use dynamic max_agents. (5) Stale RED-state eval comment already updated. All changes were made by prior tasks in the parent epic — this task confirms the work is complete. No uncommitted edits required.
